title: Salty Spideys
description: A resource pack that revamps spiders and adds a few biome based variants
body: ![Salty Spideys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d50e63861a7103ae2657431400c14c20fd02215_0.webp)A resource pack only on spiders with biome based variants and custom animations. As of now versions 1.21.2 and below are available. Versions above 1.21.2 will be released soon.
